package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerCachingCacheKeyBuiltWithFmt() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_caching_cache_key_built_with_fmt"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Caching. Flag cache keys built with fmt.Sprintf in hot paths where append/Builder or structured keys are cheaper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
